heading: Oil or gas leases; partial assignments
label: 187a Oil or gas leases; partial assignments
notes: Amendments1987— substituted third to fifth sentences for former third sentence which read as follows: “The Secretary shall disapprove the assignment or sublease only for lack of qualification of the assignee or sublessee or for lack of sufficient bond: , That the Secretary may, in his discretion, disapprove an assignment of a separate zone or deposit under any lease, or of a part of a legal subdivision.”Pub. L. 100–203Provided, however1960— amended last sentence to restrict automatic extensions after .Pub. L. 86–705Sept. 2, 19601954—Act , authorized partial assignment of a lease in its extended term regardless of reason for extension.July 29, 1954
Savings ProvisionSee note set out under .section 181 of this title

Leases Issued Prior toSeptember 2, 1960, , , provided in part that:Pub. L. 86–705, § 674 Stat. 790Sept. 2, 1960“The provisions of this section 6 [amending this section] shall not be applicable to any lease issued prior to the effective date of this Act [].”Sept. 2, 1960

children.text: A separate zone or deposit under any lease.
A part of a legal subdivision.
Less than 640 acres outside Alaska or of less than 2,560 acres within Alaska.
